title: Increase portrait size for middle 5 congress seats

log.context: Increase portrait size for middle 5 congress seats

Done. Here's what changed in `/home/clungus/work/hello-world/congress.html`:

**Center debate seat nodes (the 5 `.persona-node` circle cards in the arena):**

- `.persona-node` width/height: `96px` → `120px`
- `.persona-node .node-circle` width/min-height: `96px` → `120px`; padding: `6px 4px` → `8px 6px`
- `.persona-node .node-avatar` (portrait image): `38px × 38px` → **`80px × 80px`**
- `.node-display-name` and `.node-title` max-width: `86px` → `110px` to fit the wider card
